description: Sample optimization lineage: an accepted `xvn optimize run` that minted a child agent. Captured from the real xvn binary against the deterministic (no-network) test model. Shows the agent_lineage edge, the optimization_run header, the reproduction recipe (corpus/seed/model/optimizer/signature_hash/metric — everything needed to re-derive the run), a baseline + winning candidate pair, and the accepted snapshot. The snapshot is persisted by xvision-engine as an OPAQUE JSON blob: the engine has NO xvision-dspy / dspy-rs dependency.

candidates_baseline_and_winner.instruction:
You are a disciplined systematic trader. Given the market briefing and
current position context, decide the action and size it. Be explicit
about your rationale and keep size within the stated risk budget.
[opt copro r0 seed=7] be decisive and keep size within budget.

You are a disciplined systematic trader. Given the market briefing and
current position context, decide the action and size it. Be explicit
about your rationale and keep size within the stated risk budget.
[opt copro r1 seed=7] be decisive and keep size within budget.
